title: Ukrainian Garlic Hash
description: A hearty Ukrainian-inspired breakfast dish made with crispy hash browns and savory garlic.
instructions: Heat the garlicky oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the shredded hash browns to the skillet and press down with a spatula to form a flat layer.
Cook for 4-5 minutes on the first side, or until the hash browns are golden brown.
Flip the hash browns over and cook for an additional 4-5 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
